Diagnosis: Failed run capacitor and dirty condenser coil
Resolution: Replaced capacitor, coil clean, verified charge

Diagnosis: Cracked flame sensor and clogged condensate trap
Resolution: Cleaned sensor, cleared trap, tested ignition

Diagnosis: Low charge and stuck reversing valve solenoid
Resolution: Recovered, leak search, replaced solenoid, recharged

Diagnosis: Loose low voltage wiring at board

Resolution: Cleaned coil, replaced filter, checked charge

Diagnosis: Low airflow from collapsed flex duct
Resolution: Replaced duct section, thawed coil, verified
Replaced hot surface igniter, cycle tested
